report.summary: Cycle-close v13: Publish-v10 deployed 2 pages (Solana ETF, Crypto Payroll) to production via git push — commit e999560 triggered Vercel deploy. 412 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES, 2 in queue (Maple Finance, On-Chain Credit). Build OOMs locally but Vercel build expected to succeed. 42 TS errors confined to 2 files. Git locks still present (30h+ stale), 607 uncommitted files. All 6 API routes structurally healthy.

sections.title: QA Tester — Page & Build Audit
items: Last commit e999560 (Day 62): promoted Solana ETF + Crypto Payroll to PUBLISHED_PAGES, touched 47 files including middleware.ts, sitemap.ts, layout.tsx, and multiple page components.
412 total slug entries in PUBLISHED_PAGES (includes ~15 duplicates, Set dedupes to ~397 unique). 2 pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE: /ecosystem/maple-finance, /learn/onchain-institutional-credit-guide.
103 phantom slugs remain — published slugs without corresponding page.tsx files. Known legacy issue, non-blocking.

42 TypeScript errors across 2 files: crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (2 JSX escaping errors) and structured-data.examples.ts (40 template literal syntax errors). Both pre-existing, non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors: true).

Production build OOMs in sandbox (Bus error / core dumped) — expected given 8GB memory constraint. Vercel build should succeed with its own NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=8192' and standalone output mode.
Recently promoted pages (Solana ETF, Crypto Payroll) both passed QA in publish-v10: metadata present, JSON-LD structured data present, breadcrumbs working.

sections.title: Data Engineer — API Route Health
items: All 6 public API routes structurally healthy with in-memory cache layers: prices (60s TTL, 12 cache refs), fear-greed (10min), trending (5min), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (5min, has fallback data), defi-yields (5min).

External API endpoints (CoinGecko, DefiLlama, alternative.me) could not be verified from sandbox — egress blocked. Code-level audit confirms proper cache + stale-while-revalidate patterns on 5/6 routes.
defi-yields route lacks explicit fallback data and has 0 cache refs in code — amber flag. All other routes follow the standard 3-tier freshness pattern (fresh → stale → fallback).
0/6 public API routes have rate limiters wired — rate-limiter.ts exists but is not imported by any route handler. Unchanged from prior cycles.
Cache-Control headers properly set on 5/6 routes (defi-yields has headers but no in-memory cache layer).
ISR revalidation configured on all 6 routes.

sections.title: DevOps — Deployment Status
items: Latest commit e999560 (Day 62) was pushed to main — Vercel deploy triggered per publish-v10 report.
Previous production deploy was cb65a9d (Day 42) — now superseded by e999560 if Vercel build succeeded.
Git lock files still present: HEAD.lock (30h stale, created Mar 16 11:17), index.lock (28h stale, created Mar 16 13:06). 607 uncommitted files in working directory.
next.config.ts: ignoreBuildErrors: true, standalone output, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency: 4, workerThreads: false — all optimized for Vercel's 8GB build environment.
Security headers properly configured in both next.config.ts (X-DNS-Prefetch-Control, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy) and middleware (X-Robots-Tag, Cache-Control).
IMPORTANT: If Vercel deploy from e999560 succeeded, production is running Day 62 code. Cannot confirm from sandbox — Jefe should verify at vercel.com/0x-machina/cryptodegen/deployments.

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Summary
items: SHIPPED SINCE LAST EOD (v12): publish-v10 (Solana ETF + Crypto Payroll promoted and pushed to main), build-v10/v11 (Maple Finance ecosystem + On-Chain Credit guide built and queued), community-v13/v14 (social content drafts), standup-v15/v16, design-v10 reports.
PUBLISHED PAGES: 412 slug entries (~397 unique after dedup). +4 since last EOD (Solana ETF, Crypto Payroll promoted; Maple Finance and On-Chain Credit added to queue).
CARRY-OVER: 103 phantom slugs, 42 TS errors in 2 files, 0/6 API rate limiters, defi-yields missing fallback data and cache layer, ~15 duplicate entries in PUBLISHED_PAGES.

BLOCKER: Git locks (30h+ stale) block local commits. However, publish-v10 successfully pushed e999560 — suggesting locks may have been temporarily cleared or bypassed. 607 uncommitted files still tracked locally.

NEXT CYCLE PRIORITIES: (1) Verify Vercel deploy of e999560 is live, (2) promote Maple Finance + On-Chain Credit from queue, (3) wire rate limiters on public API routes, (4) add fallback data to defi-yields route, (5) clean up duplicate slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES.
